zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Burt於1656年9月4日出生在美國西維吉尼亞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德時，她的父親Jonathan Burt31歲，母親Elizabeth Lobdell25歲。她於1675年4月22日與Benjamin Dorchester在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1746年11月8日在她的家鄉享年90歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Burt于1656年9月4日出生在美国西弗吉尼亚州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德时，她的父亲Jonathan Burt31岁，母亲Elizabeth Lobdell25岁。她于1675年4月22日与Benjamin Dorchester在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1746年11月8日在她的家乡享年90岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Burt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Bird
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Birt
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places in the Rhineland named Birth or Birten.
In some cases also Croatian: occupational name from birt ‘inn-keeper’, a regional or colloquial word of German origin (see Wirt ).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Burt was born on 4 September 1656, in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, United States, her father, Jonathan Burt, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Lobdell, was 25. She married Benjamin Dorchester on 22 April 1675, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 8 November 1746, in her hometown, at the age of 90, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Burt est née le 4 septembre 1656, à Springfield, Hampshire, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis, son père, Jonathan Burt, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lobdell, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Dorchester le 22 avril 1675, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 novembre 1746, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Burt am 4. September 1656 in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jonathan Burt 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lobdell 25. Sie hat am 22. April 1675 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Benjamin Dorchester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 8. November 1746 im Alter von 90 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Burt è nata il il 4 settembre 1656 nel Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Jonathan Burt, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Lobdell, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Dorchester il 22 aprile 1675, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 novembre 1746, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Burtが1656年9月4日にアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで生まれた時，父Jonathan Burtは31歳，母Elizabeth Lobdellは25歳であった。1675年4月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドでBenjamin Dorchesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1746年11月8日に故郷で90歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드
ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Province of Mass: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampd: 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리
ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Burt(이)가 1656년 9월 4일 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jonathan Burt(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lobdell(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1675년 4월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 Benjamin Dorchester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1746년 11월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Burt nasceu em 4 de setembro de 1656, em Springfield, Hampshire, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jonathan Burt, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lobdell, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Dorchester em 22 de abril de 1675, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1746, em sua cidade natal, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Burt родилась 4 сентября 1656 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Jonathan Burt было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lobdell, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Dorchester 22 апреля 1675 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 8 ноября 1746 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Benjamin Dorchester el 22 de abril de 1675, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
